message:
Add session key verification to review submission for security

Security Enhancement:
- Add ErrSessionKeyMismatch error type to clearly indicate when a review
  submission fails due to session key mismatch, distinct from other session
  errors like ErrSessionNotFound or ErrSessionInactive.

- Implement session key verification in ReviewService.SubmitReview() to ensure
  the opts.SessionKey matches the session.SessionKey stored in the database.
  This prevents review spoofing attacks where a malicious actor might attempt
  to submit reviews using a valid session ID but without possessing the
  secret session key.

Background:
The session key is a cryptographic secret generated when a session is created.
It is used to sign reviews (via HMAC) and must be presented when submitting
reviews. Previously, only the session ID was checked; now the actual session
key is also verified before allowing the review to proceed.

This strengthens the two-person rule enforcement by ensuring that review
submissions can only come from the actual session holder, not from someone
who merely knows the session ID (which may be visible in logs or status output).
